scripts.validate:unit: node validate-temporal-surface.js && node test-crystal-field.mjs && node test-capture-recipes.mjs && node test-capture-transaction.mjs && node test-capture-hook.mjs && node test-capture-status.mjs && node test-lifecycle-profile.mjs && node test-frost-evidence-artifacts.mjs && node test-physical-review.mjs && node test-finalize-physical-review.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
